_note: Approved paths for Compliance (AUR-J-COMP-001). Phase 4 shipped OFAC screening (2 paths). Phase 4.5 adds pre-trade policy (3 paths) and algo inventory (2 paths).

paths.description: Counterparty not present on fixture SDN list. Clear — lifecycle continues to downstream agents.

Counterparty exact-matches a fixture SDN entry. Halt-and-pend unless override approved. If counterparty jurisdiction is EU, the OFAC_VS_GDPR_DATA_RETENTION conflict also applies (dual-authority resolution required).
All pre-trade policy checks (mandate + IPS) passed. Lifecycle proceeds to ThifurJ.
Pre-trade policy produced a HOLD — mandate or IPS constraint approach. Halt-and-pend single-authority (Compliance) override review.
Pre-trade policy hard violation (prohibited asset class, jurisdiction, or explicit BLOCK rule). Terminal halt — no override.
All active algorithms registered per MiFID II RTS 6 with valid last_validated_at. Operational continuity permitted.
Active algorithm not registered or registration stale. Halt-and-pend dual-authority resolution (Compliance + Legal) per approval_lineage_rules.
